name: The Root Dao
spiritVeins: Source substrate of all Daos; not a cultivable realm
knownFacts: The outermost reality — the 'true' Dao-source underlying everything
Fundamental laws: Five Elements, Karma, Reincarnation, Life-Death, True-False, Absolute Beginning/End, Restriction, Slaughter
Not a place one 'lives in'; it is the substrate of all existence
Wang Lin ultimately comprehends his 14th essence (Reincarnation) here, achieving Heaven Trampling
keyEvents: Wang Lin comprehends the Reincarnation Essence here, achieving Heaven Trampling (4th Step)

name: Luo Tian Star System
spiritVeins: True-reality tier; Void Tribulant and Grand Empyrean cultivators routinely operate here
knownFacts: The 'true' star-system-level reality outside the Cave World
The Immortal Astral Continent floats in Luo Tian's void
Home of the Luo Tian Star Domain where the Luo Tian Alliance War was fought
The Three Auspicious Treasures (Xu Liguo, Liu Jinbiao, Zhong Dahong) were originally cultivators from Luo Tian
keyEvents: Wang Lin's Luo Tian Alliance War arc (Book 7-8)
Wang Lin slew the Water Daoist here
Luo Tian Thunder Immortal Realm existed here before collapsing

name: Immortal Astral Continent
nameCn: 仙罔大陆 / 仙罡大陆
spiritVeins: Vast continent with nine suns (Grand Empyreans); absolute-tier spiritual energy throughout
knownFacts: A continent so vast it has nine suns — each a Grand Empyrean
Subdivided into provinces: Heavenly Bull, Green Devil, Mountain Sea, Great Saint, Mengtu, Tianniu, Green Bull continents
Originally ruled by Immortal Emperor Lian Daozhen; later by Ancient Clan Dao Ancient Great Heavenly Venerable
The Cave World is a pocket-world of the IAC
keyEvents: Wang Lin arrives as a Third-Step cultivator, condenses Void Clone causing 9 suns to manifest simultaneously
Wang Lin slays Gu Dao and becomes 'the Tenth Sun'
Wang Lin Transcends the 9 Heaven Trampling Bridges and leaves with Li Muwan

name: The Cave World
spiritVeins: Medium-tier laws within (seal suppresses high-tier cultivation); contains billions of cultivation planets
knownFacts: A sealed dimensional bubble floating in Luo Tian's void
Created by the Seven-Colored Daoist to harvest Joss Flames (cultivation energy from mortal faith)
Has a sealed inner half (Sealed Realm) and an outer half (Outer Realm)
Third-Step cultivators cannot naturally arise within due to the seal
keyEvents: The entire Book 1-9 takes place inside the Cave World
Wang Lin discovers its true nature in Book 11 when he breaches the Ancient Immortal Domain
Wang Lin kills the Seven-Colored Daoist, renames it 'Wang Lin's Cave World', becomes the new owner

name: Sealed Realm
spiritVeins: Seal caps cultivation at Heaven Blight / quasi-Third-Step tier
knownFacts: The inner half of the Cave World, separated from the Outer Realm by the Realm-Sealing Grand Array
Contains Planet Suzaku, Brilliant Void Star System, Allheaven Star System, Cloud Sea Star System
The Realm-Sealing Grand Array's spirit is the Heaven-Splitting Axe
Suppresses Third-Step cultivation — only 'Heaven Blight' cultivators can squeeze through
keyEvents: The Sealed Realm War — Wang Lin as first responder, slaughtering thousands of Outer Realm cultivators
Wang Lin becomes 'Lord of the Sealed Realm'
Wang Lin resets the Realm Sealing Grand Array at end of arc

name: Outer Realm
spiritVeins: Higher-tier spiritual energy; less restricted cultivation-wise than the Sealed Realm
knownFacts: The outer half of the Cave World; the half NOT inside the Sealed Realm
Higher-tier cultivators dwell here
Daoist Water (Shui Daozi) was from here
Both sides are still sealed within the Cave World overall
keyEvents: Wang Lin flees to the Outer Realm with Li Qianmei after the Wind Celestial Realm arc
Multiple Outer-Realm third-step cultivators killed by Wang Lin borrowing the Heaven-Splitting Axe

name: Primordial Divine Realm
spiritVeins: Absolute-tier; tied to the Heaven Defying Bead / Realm-Defining Compass
knownFacts: A sub-dimension accessible from the Cave World after Wang Lin reaches Third Step
The place where Tianyunzi's true body hides
Exists because of the Heaven Defying Bead / Realm-Defining Compass
Wang Lin crosses the 9 Heaven Trampling Bridges here
keyEvents: Wang Lin's final battle with Tianyunzi (who intended to possess Wang Lin but was defeated)
Wang Lin crosses the 9 Heaven Trampling Bridges here

name: Brilliant Void Star System
nameCn: 玄虚星系 / 联盟星系
spiritVeins: Contains ~7 million cultivation planets; Nascent Soul+ tier common

Site of the Alliance-Allheaven War

spiritVeins: Rival star system to the Alliance; Nascent Soul+ tier common

keyEvents: Wang Lin's fame arc — Yao Family kill-order on Wang Lin

spiritVeins: Higher-tier than Alliance/Allheaven; Nirvana Scryer+ cultivators common; cloud-covered spirit worlds

name: Dong Lin Pool
spiritVeins: Absolute-tier; sealed Ancient God-tier entity beneath; grants Absolute Beginning and Reincarnation Essence comprehension
knownFacts: A pool with the sealed spirit of an Ancient God-tier entity beneath it
Located on the IAC in the Dong Lin Sect area (Great Saint Continent)
False version (inside Fifth Flower's illusory world) grants temporary power
True version grants permanent Absolute Beginning and Reincarnation Essence comprehension
keyEvents: Wang Lin meditates for 13 years here; Absolute Beginning reaches completion; Reincarnation Essence begun

name: Immortal Emperor's Cave Mansion
spiritVeins: Medium-tier; ancient immortal residual energy; Celestial Emperor's Tower part of complex
knownFacts: A cave-mansion left by an ancient immortal, on/under Demon Spirit Land (Tian Yun Star)
Yao Xixue and Wang Lin explore it together (causing her hundred-year imprisonment)
The Wind Demon (Feng Mo) is encountered here
Celestial Emperor's Tower is part of this complex
keyEvents: Yao Xixue ambushes Wang Lin and is imprisoned for 100 years
Yao Xinghai seeks Wang Lin here
Wind Demon slain by Wang Lin's God-Slaying Spear

name: Heavenly Bull Continent
spiritVeins: Absolute-tier; 120+ Fire Veins; rich fire-element spiritual energy

name: Green Devil Continent
spiritVeins: Absolute-tier; Green Devil (Green Scorpion) demonic energy pervades
knownFacts: Home continent of the Green Devil (Green Scorpion) entity on the IAC
The Dao Devil Sect (Dao Demon Sect) is based here
Wang Lin was captured here as a Green Devil sacrifice

spiritVeins: Absolute-tier; contains the Mountain Tree Seal

name: Great Saint Continent

name: Green Bull Continent
